title: Fig. 1   Fig. 2 146   Laboratory Manual
subject: Mathematics
objective:
To verify Pythagoras Theorem.   Chart paper, glazed papers of
different colours, geometry box,
scissors, adhesive.
procedure:
1. Take a glazed paper and draw a right angled triangle whose base is ‘ b ’ units
and perpendicular is ‘ a ’ units as shown in Fig. 1.
2. Take another glazed paper and draw a right angled triangle whose base is ‘ a ’
units and perpendicular is ‘ b ’ units as shown in Fig. 2.
discussion:
This activity can be used in day to day life in making pictures (photographs) of
same object in different sizes.
148   Laboratory Manual
